message:
Merge PR #2520: guard against bd v0.58.0 non-JSON output in list parsers

bd v0.58.0 can return plain text for empty results instead of JSON.
Move isJSON check before json.Unmarshal to prevent parse errors.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2520
Author: dannomayernotabot (Danno)

Co-Authored-By: Danno <dannomayernotabot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
